unit.note: shared/tests/ (2227) + plugins/shipwright-compliance/tests/ (474) + plugins/shipwright-adopt/tests/ (284) + plugins/shipwright-security/tests/ (311) + plugins/shipwright-iterate/tests/ (237) + integration-tests/ (110). All green. 19 NEW tests added: test_audit_snapshot.py (+3 multi-producer Run-ID), test_update_compliance_phases.py (4 new PHASE_REPORTS entries), test_adopt_commit_template.py (6), test_finalize_security_compliance.py (6). Pre-existing 3624 tests still pass — no regressions.

integration.note: No integration surface; covered via integration-tests/ unit-style suite.

surface_verification.note: F0.5 cli surface — 20 compliance tests covering snapshot Run-ID acceptance (adopt + security trailers) + new PHASE_REPORTS entries. Single attempt, no retries. The adopt template (6 tests) + security finalize (6 tests) suites pass separately at F0; pytest conftest discovery prevents mixing plugin tests in one invocation, so F0.5 narrows to compliance subset which directly verifies the iterate's audit-side ACs.
